name: ClickHouse MCP
description: Official ClickHouse Cloud MCP — run SQL queries, list databases and tables, explore services and backups, inspect usage, and manage ClickPipes.

skills.name: SQL Query
skills.description: Executes read-only SELECT queries against a ClickHouse Cloud service with configurable timeout up to one hour.

skills.name: Schema Exploration
skills.description: Lists databases and tables with full column metadata across ClickHouse Cloud services in an organization.

skills.name: Service Management
skills.description: Retrieves service details, backup configurations, cost reports, and ClickPipe status for ClickHouse Cloud orgs.
